title: AWS Cloud Innovators Summit 2025
subtitle: Explore the future of cloud computing
description: Join us for the AWS Cloud Innovators Summit 2025, a one-day event focused on the latest in cloud computing, AI/ML, and serverless technologies.

sessions.title: Building Serverless Applications with AWS Lambda
